ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hedge_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hedge fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the hedge fund */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares held in the hedge fund */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the investment in thousands of dollars */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Recent activity percentage change */,
  "portfolio_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total portfolio represented by this hedge fund */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the hedge fund was established */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Primary investment strategy of the fund */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required to join the fund */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fund's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hedge_funds_manager_name FOREIGN KEY ("manager_name") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager for contact */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the manager has been in the investment field */,
  "manager_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the fund manager */,
  "manager_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the fund manager */,
  "manager_performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the manager (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the portfolio */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedge fund associated with this portfolio */,
  "investment_value" REAL /* Total investment value of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "portfolio_description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio's strategy and goals */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for client communication */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy preferred by the client */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "client_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "client_country" TEXT /* Country of residence for the client */,
  "client_tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number for the client */,
  "client_risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the client (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated hedge fund */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the hedge fund */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the relevant market index on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market value is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment activity */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedge fund related to the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "shares_changed" INTEGER /* Number of shares changed in this activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the investment activity (e.g., Market Conditions, Rebalancing) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the activity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the activity record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_activities_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedge fund associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance report */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage reported for the fund */,
  "fee_percentage" REAL /* Management fee percentage for the fund */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the performance report (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "highlights" TEXT /* Key highlights from the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which this investment belongs */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hedge fund associated with this investment */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares invested in the hedge fund */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "investment_value" REAL /* Total value of the investment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the investment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_investments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_investments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES hedge_funds ("fund_id")
)
